Hi Maisa. The client needs the report soon. When will it be ready?
Do not worry, David. I will send it by Friday.
Great. What is your plan?
Tonight, I am going to check all the numbers. Tomorrow, I am going to write the summary.
Perfect. Please make sure it is on time.
I promise. There is no delay. I will call you as soon as it is ready.
Thank you. And are you going to work on the weekend?
No, I am not going to work on the weekend. I will finish everything by Friday.
There is no delay.

Hi Maisa, this is David. I have good news about the client project. I am going to start the new report on Monday. I promise it will be ready by Thursday. First, I am going to check all the numbers. Then I will write the summary. I want to send it on time, so there is no delay. If I have a problem, I will call you as soon as I can. Please make sure the client has my email. Thank you very much. Talk soon!

Hello, this is Sarah from the finance team. I want to tell you about my plan for this week. On Tuesday, I am going to finish the budget. The deadline is Friday, so I have time. I promise to send it before the weekend. I am not going to work late, but I will make sure it is correct. If there is a small delay, I will call the manager. I always want to send my work on time. Have a great day!
